project.description: Modify the firmware binary file to embed the version info and release to OTA server

hudson.model.ChoiceParameterDefinition.name: PRODUCT_NAME
hudson.model.ChoiceParameterDefinition.description:
Product Name:
Reactor_50 => Reactor 50
Reactor_100 => Reactor 100

hudson.model.ChoiceParameterDefinition.name: PROJ_NAME
hudson.model.ChoiceParameterDefinition.description: Name of the project to be released

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: BUILD_NO
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: # of the build to be released

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: ESP32_BUILD_NO
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: # of the ESP32 firmware build Set to the default value 1 if ESP32 firmware does not need to be updated
